title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Crompton Greaves

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Crompton Greaves
jsonLd.description:
We at Crompton Greaves are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Crompton Greaves:
Crompton Greaves is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crompton Greaves!
